title: OECD International Trade by Commodity Statistics (ITCS)

access_methods.notes: Official OECD serial page documenting annual ITCS dissemination.
Official OECD Data Explorer API documentation describing SDMX raw-data access syntax.
Official OECD public SDMX dataflow registry tested on 2026-04-22.
Official OECD archive SDMX dataflow registry tested on 2026-04-22 because ITCS is documented as discontinued.

access_conditions: OECD documents SDMX API access for OECD Data Explorer datasets through the public and archive registries.
The publication portal for ITCS remained web-only in this session.
limitations: No exact OECD SDMX dataflow for ITCS was identified in the official public or archive registries tested on 2026-04-22.
The official OECD ITCS publication page returned HTTP 403 in this environment, so no raw ITCS file was downloaded in this session.
